name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench.
Grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder width.
Lower the bar to your chest.
Press the bar back up to the starting position.

name: Incline Barbell Press
instructions: Set an incline bench to 30-45 degrees.
Grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder width.
Lower the bar to your upper chest.
Press the bar back up.

name: Decline Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a decline bench.
Grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder width.
Lower the bar to your lower chest.
Press the bar back up.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand.
Press the dumbbells up until arms are extended.
Lower the dumbbells to chest level.
Press back up.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set an incline bench to 30-45 degrees.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Press the dumbbells up until arms are extended.
Lower back to starting position.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with dumbbells above your chest.
Lower the dumbbells out to the sides with a slight bend in elbows.
Squeeze your chest to bring the dumbbells back together.
Repeat.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Stand between two cable machines.
Grab the handles with arms extended.
Bring hands together in front of your chest.
Slowly return to starting position.

name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Set cables to the highest position.
Step forward and lean slightly.
Bring hands together in a downward arc.
Squeeze chest at the bottom and return slowly.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Place hands slightly wider than shoulder width.
Keep body in a straight line.
Lower your chest to the floor.
Push back up to starting position.

name: Chest Dip
instructions: Grip parallel bars and lean forward slightly.
Lower your body until upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Push back up to starting position.
Keep elbows slightly flared.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Sit on the chest press machine.
Grip the handles at chest height.
Push the handles forward until arms are extended.
Return slowly to starting position.

name: Pec Deck Fly
instructions: Sit on the pec deck machine.
Place forearms against the pads.
Bring the pads together in front of your chest.
Slowly return to starting position.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Bend at the waist with knees slightly bent.
Grip the barbell with an overhand grip.
Pull the bar to your lower chest.
Lower the bar back down.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart.
Bend at hips and knees to grip the bar.
Drive through your heels to stand up.
Lower the bar back to the ground.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at a lat pulldown machine.
Grab the bar wider than shoulder width.
Pull the bar down to your upper chest.
Slowly return to starting position.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip.
Pull yourself up until chin is above the bar.
Lower yourself back down with control.
Repeat.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Hang from a bar with an underhand grip.
Pull yourself up until chin is above the bar.
Lower yourself back down with control.
Repeat.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: Place one knee and hand on a bench.
Hold a dumbbell in the other hand.
Pull the dumbbell to your hip.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit at a cable row machine with feet on the platform.
Grab the handle and sit upright.
Pull the handle to your abdomen.
Slowly return to starting position.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle the T-bar row machine.
Grip the handles and bend at the waist.
Pull the weight to your chest.
Lower back down with control.

name: Close-Grip Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at a lat pulldown machine.
Use a close-grip V-bar attachment.
Pull the bar down to your upper chest.
Slowly return to starting position.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
instructions: Stand facing a cable machine with a straight bar.
Keep arms straight and pull the bar down to your thighs.
Squeeze your lats at the bottom.
Return slowly to starting position.

name: Back Extension
instructions: Position yourself on a back extension bench.
Cross arms over your chest.
Lower your upper body towards the floor.
Raise back up to a straight position.

name: Pendlay Row
instructions: Bend over until torso is parallel to the floor.
Grip the barbell on the floor.
Explosively pull the bar to your chest.
Lower the bar back to the floor each rep.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the barbell at shoulder height.
Press the bar overhead until arms are locked.
Lower back to shoulder height.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit on a bench with back support.
Hold dumbbells at shoulder height.
Press the dumbbells overhead.
Lower back to shoulder height.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of your shoulders with palms facing you.
Rotate your palms outward as you press overhead.
Reverse the motion as you lower.
Repeat.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at your sides.
Raise arms out to the sides until parallel to the floor.
Lower back down slowly.
Keep a slight bend in elbows.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells in front of your thighs.
Raise one arm forward to shoulder height.
Lower and repeat with the other arm.
Keep arms straight with a slight bend.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set a cable machine to upper chest height.
Grab the rope attachment with both hands.
Pull towards your face, separating the rope ends.
Squeeze shoulder blades together.

name: Reverse Fly
instructions: Bend forward at the waist holding dumbbells.
Raise the dumbbells out to the sides.
Squeeze shoulder blades together at the top.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand sideways to a low cable machine.
Grab the handle with the far hand.
Raise your arm out to the side to shoulder height.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit on the shoulder press machine.
Grip the handles at shoulder height.
Press the handles overhead.
Lower back to starting position.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Stand holding a barbell with a narrow grip.
Pull the bar up along your body to chin height.
Keep elbows higher than your hands.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand with a barbell using an underhand grip.
Curl the bar up to shoulder level.
Lower back down slowly.
Keep elbows close to your body.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells with a neutral grip.
Curl the weights up keeping palms facing each other.
Lower back down slowly.
Keep elbows stationary.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand.
Curl the dumbbells up while supinating your wrists.
Squeeze at the top.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Sit at a preacher curl bench.
Rest your upper arms on the pad.
Curl the bar up to shoulder level.
Lower back down with control.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit on a bench with legs spread.
Rest your elbow against your inner thigh.
Curl the dumbbell up to your shoulder.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Stand facing a low cable machine.
Grab the bar with an underhand grip.
Curl the bar up to shoulder level.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Sit on an incline bench set to 45 degrees.
Let dumbbells hang at your sides.
Curl the dumbbells up.
Lower back down with a full stretch.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
instructions: Stand holding an EZ-bar with an underhand grip.
Curl the bar up to shoulder level.
Lower back down slowly.
Keep elbows close to your body.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at a cable machine with a straight bar attachment.
Push the bar down until arms are fully extended.
Slowly return to starting position.
Keep elbows close to your body.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding an EZ bar.
Lower the bar towards your forehead.
Extend arms back to starting position.
Keep upper arms stationary.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Grip parallel bars with arms straight.
Lower your body by bending your elbows.
Keep your torso upright.
Push back up to starting position.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold a dumbbell overhead with both hands.
Lower the dumbbell behind your head.
Extend arms back to the top.
Keep elbows pointing forward.

name: Rope Pushdown
instructions: Attach a rope to a high cable pulley.
Push the rope down and spread the ends apart.
Squeeze triceps at the bottom.
Return slowly to starting position.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench.
Grip the barbell with hands shoulder-width apart.
Lower the bar to your chest.
Press back up focusing on triceps.

name: Tricep Kickback
instructions: Bend forward with one hand on a bench.
Hold a dumbbell with your upper arm parallel to the floor.
Extend your forearm back until arm is straight.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Diamond Push-Up
instructions: Place hands close together forming a diamond shape.
Lower your chest towards your hands.
Push back up to starting position.
Keep core tight throughout.

name: Squat
instructions: Place the barbell on your upper back.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Squat down until thighs are parallel to the floor.
Drive through your heels to stand back up.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Hold the barbell across the front of your shoulders.
Keep elbows high and chest up.
Squat down until thighs are parallel.
Drive back up through your heels.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit on the leg press machine.
Place feet shoulder-width apart on the platform.
Push the platform away by extending your legs.
Lower back down with control.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Hold dumbbells at your sides.
Step forward into a lunge position.
Lower your back knee towards the floor.
Push off the front foot and step forward with the other leg.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit on the leg extension machine.
Hook your feet under the pad.
Extend your legs until straight.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold a dumbbell vertically at your chest.
Stand with feet slightly wider than shoulder width.
Squat down keeping the dumbbell close to your body.
Drive back up through your heels.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Position yourself on the hack squat machine.
Place feet shoulder-width apart on the platform.
Lower yourself by bending your knees.
Push back up to starting position.

name: Sissy Squat
instructions: Stand holding onto a support for balance.
Lean back while bending your knees.
Lower until you feel a deep stretch in your quads.
Push back up to standing.

name: Step-Up
instructions: Stand in front of a bench holding dumbbells.
Step up onto the bench with one foot.
Drive through your heel to stand on the bench.
Step back down and repeat.

name: Smith Machine Squat
instructions: Position yourself under the Smith machine bar.
Place feet slightly forward of the bar.
Squat down until thighs are parallel.
Push back up to starting position.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold a barbell at hip level.
Push hips back while lowering the bar along your legs.
Keep a slight bend in your knees.
Return to standing by driving hips forward.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on the leg curl machine.
Curl your legs up towards your glutes.
Lower back down slowly.
Keep hips pressed against the pad.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Place a barbell on your upper back.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hinge at the hips and lower your torso forward.
Return to standing by driving hips forward.

name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
instructions: Hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Keep legs nearly straight.
Lower the bar towards the floor by hinging at the hips.
Return to standing.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Sit on the seated leg curl machine.
Place your legs on top of the pad.
Curl your legs down and back.
Return slowly to starting position.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Kneel on the floor with ankles secured.
Slowly lower your body forward using your hamstrings.
Catch yourself with your hands at the bottom.
Push back up and use hamstrings to return.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit on the floor with upper back against a bench.
Place a barbell across your hips.
Drive through your heels to lift hips up.
Squeeze glutes at the top and lower back down.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat.
Drive through your heels to lift hips up.
Squeeze glutes at the top.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand with one foot on a bench behind you.
Hold dumbbells at your sides.
Lower your back knee towards the floor.
Push back up through your front heel.

name: Cable Pull-Through
instructions: Stand facing away from a low cable machine.
Grab the rope between your legs.
Hinge at the hips and let the cable pull you back.
Drive hips forward to standing.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Stand with a wide stance and toes pointed out.
Grip the bar between your legs.
Drive through your heels to stand up.
Lower the bar back to the ground.

name: Donkey Kick
instructions: Get on all fours.
Kick one leg back and up towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your glute at the top.
Lower back down and repeat.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on the calf raise machine.
Rise up on your toes as high as possible.
Hold briefly at the top.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit on the seated calf raise machine.
Place the balls of your feet on the platform.
Raise your heels as high as possible.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
instructions: Bend at the waist and place hands on a support.
Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface.
Rise up on your toes.
Lower back down with a full stretch.

name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on one foot on a raised surface.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand for resistance.
Rise up on your toes as high as possible.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent.
Place hands behind your head.
Curl your upper body towards your knees.
Lower back down with control.

name: Plank
instructions: Get into a push-up position on your forearms.
Keep your body in a straight line.
Hold the position for the desired time.
Keep your core tight throughout.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar.
Raise your legs until they are parallel to the floor.
Lower back down slowly.
Avoid swinging.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel in front of a high cable machine.
Hold the rope behind your head.
Crunch down towards the floor.
Return slowly to starting position.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit on the floor with knees bent.
Lean back slightly and lift feet off the floor.
Rotate your torso from side to side.
Keep core engaged throughout.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with hands behind your head.
Bring one knee towards your chest.
Rotate your torso to touch the opposite elbow to the knee.
Alternate sides in a pedaling motion.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel on the floor holding an ab wheel.
Roll the wheel forward extending your body.
Go as far as you can while maintaining form.
Roll back to starting position.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Start in a push-up position.
Drive one knee towards your chest.
Quickly switch legs.
Continue alternating at a fast pace.

name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Stand holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Shrug your shoulders up towards your ears.
Hold briefly at the top.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at your sides.
Shrug your shoulders up towards your ears.
Hold briefly at the top.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Trap Bar Shrug
instructions: Stand inside a trap bar and grip the handles.
Shrug your shoulders up towards your ears.
Hold briefly at the top.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Farmer's Walk
instructions: Hold heavy dumbbells at your sides.
Walk forward with short, quick steps.
Keep your shoulders back and core tight.
Walk for the desired distance or time.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Sit on a bench with forearms resting on your thighs.
Hold a barbell with an underhand grip.
Curl your wrists up.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
instructions: Sit on a bench with forearms resting on your thighs.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Curl your wrists up.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Reverse Curl
instructions: Stand holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Curl the bar up to shoulder level.
Lower back down slowly.
Keep elbows close to your body.

name: Plate Pinch
instructions: Pinch two weight plates together with your fingers.
Hold for as long as possible.
Switch hands and repeat.
Use smooth-sided plates for more challenge.
